channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Abubakar Malami Confirmed as ADC Governorship Candidate for Kebbi State Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Attorney-General of the Federation, Abubakar Malami, has been officially confirmed as the governorship candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) for Kebbi State ahead of the 2027 gener...

item.title: US skateboarder Jason Vanporppal finishes 6,400km fundraising journey in Cape Town for Uganda skatepark project
item.description: American skateboarder Jason Vanporppal has successfully completed an ambitious cross-continental journey, arriving in Cape Town after travelling more than 6,400 kilometres across Africa. His mission, ...

item.title: Kitchener police lay weapons charges after seizing loaded handgun from Hamilton man
item.description: Police in Kitchener have charged a Hamilton man following a weapons investigation that resulted in the seizure of a loaded handgun. According to the report published by CTV News Kitchener on May 24, 2...

item.title: Nintendo Life Poll Invites Players to Rate Yoshi and the Mysterious Book on Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo Life has published a community poll inviting readers to rate the newly released Switch 2 title, Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, following its recent launch. The game, starring T. Yoshisaur Mun...

item.title: Wind and solar surpass gas in global electricity generation for the first time in April 2026
item.description: According to a new analysis from the independent energy think tank Ember, April 2026 marked a historic milestone in global electricity generation. For the first time, wind and solar power together pro...

item.title: China sends three astronauts on crewed mission supporting lunar exploration programme
item.description: China has successfully launched a three-crew space flight as part of its long-term ambitions to explore and eventually reach the Moon. According to reports from Agence France-Presse, the mission lifte...

item.title: Prolonged Bell internet outage disrupts Bridgetown Legion operations and local residents
item.description: A prolonged internet outage affecting some Bell Canada customers in Bridgetown, Nova Scotia, has left a local Royal Canadian Legion branch and nearby residents without service for more than a week. Th...

item.title: Liverpool secure Champions League place after draw with Brentford as Mohamed Salah and Andy Robertson bid farewell at Anfield
item.description: Liverpool secured qualification for next season’s Champions League after a tense 1-1 draw against Brentford at Anfield on the final day of the Premier League season. Curtis Jones gave Liverpool the le...

item.title: Arsenal clinch Premier League title with 2-1 victory over Crystal Palace on final day
item.description: Arsenal have officially been crowned Premier League champions after sealing a 2-1 win over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park on the final day of the season. The victory confirmed a remarkable campaign u...

item.title: US and Iran Advance Framework Agreement to End Recent Conflict and Address Key Disputes
item.description: The United States and Iran are currently negotiating a memorandum of understanding aimed at transforming a recent ceasefire into a more durable peace arrangement following weeks of conflict. While bot...

item.title: Teal independents consider party-like structure to expand Senate presence and counter One Nation
item.description: Teal independents are reportedly exploring whether their loosely organised, hyper-local campaigning approach could be adapted into a more formal, party-like structure, particularly as they look to exp...

item.title: FG pushes cooperative housing and affordable homes for low-income Nigerians
item.description: The Federal Government, through the Ministry of Housing and Urban Development, don restate its commitment to inclusive development and sustainable housing delivery for Nigerians. Speaking during a Hou...

item.title: Archival photographs and life story of Evelyn Nesbit during the 1910s
item.description: The article presents a curated collection of archival photographs of Evelyn Nesbit, one of early 20th-century America’s most recognizable public figures, alongside a summary of her life during the 191...

item.title: Criticism mounts over Trump’s proposed Iran deal amid doubts about enforceability and trust
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that he is pursuing a potential new agreement with Iran, suggesting it could improve on previous diplomatic efforts such as the Obama-era nuclear deal. However, the an...

item.title: Explanation of why the Premier League uses two identical trophies following Arsenal’s 2025/2026 title win
item.description: Arsenal have been crowned Premier League champions for the 2025/2026 season after a strong campaign under manager Mikel Arteta, marking a major achievement for the club. The Gunners secured the title ...

item.title: Chris Brown receives honorary doctorate for contribution to music and performance arts
item.description: R&B superstar Chris Brown has been awarded an honorary Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Visual and Performing Arts in recognition of his long-standing contribution to global music, dance, and entertainme...

item.title: Allegations of improper handling of flood relief aid against Theewaterskloof mayor
item.description: A political controversy has emerged in the DA-led Theewaterskloof Municipality in the Western Cape following serious allegations concerning the handling of humanitarian flood relief aid. The GOOD Part...

item.title: Driver arrested for travelling at 222 km/h in a 120 km/h zone during KZN traffic operation
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal authorities have confirmed the arrest of a motorist, identified as the son of a senior politician and cabinet member, after he was allegedly caught driving at 222 km/h in a 120 km/h zone...

item.title: PDEA conducts buy-bust in Naga City, Cebu; seizes PHP 136 million worth of suspected shabu
item.description: Authorities from the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA-7), in coordination with other law enforcement units, successfully carried out a buy-bust operation in Barangay Uling, Naga City, Cebu, re...

item.title: US–Iran negotiations progress as Trump signals near-complete agreement to end conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump has indicated that negotiations between the United States and Iran are advancing towards a potential agreement aimed at ending the ongoing conflict, although he has also caut...
